input.feature: Use helper functions latest(), latestForItem(), latestForTicket() to read and filter output tables
input.task: Document the pattern: given ctx.outputs.review (array of { ticketId, approved, ... }), implement latestForTicket(ctx.outputs.review, ticketId) to find the most recent review for that ticket. Then use it to compute loop-exit condition isApproved = latestForTicket(...)?.approved === true. Show how this pattern scales to N items in parallel worktrees.
